VAL_METRIC: 0.5534545454545454
analysis: Attempted to refine the pre-training task by expanding the geometric prediction from merely volume and sphericity to include a multi-scale spatial mask regression (effectively forcing the network to act like an autoencoder for the inner geometric structure) and partially freezing the lower levels of the network during BraTS fine-tuning. Despite the theoretical robustness, this constrained the capacity of the model too severely during fine-tuning (peak validation AUC only reached 0.5535, well below the previous unconstrained best of 0.6051). Freezing the pre-trained weights seems counter-productive when transitioning from purely synthetic shapes to heavily textured MRI data.
